q.en: When did the NCAA Division I Men's Basketball Tournament (March Madness) begin?
q.zh: NCAA一级男子篮球锦标赛（疯狂三月）是从什么时候开始的？

options.en: 2016 according to some versions of the story
March 17, 1939

explain.en: On March 17, 1939, the NCAA Division I Men's Basketball Tournament began its historic run.
explain.zh: 1939年3月17日，NCAA一级男子篮球锦标赛开始了它的历史征程。

q.en: How many teams play in the March Madness tournament each year?
q.zh: 每年有多少支球队参加疯狂三月锦标赛？

explain.en: Only 68 teams make it into the tournament each year out of 351 eligible schools.
explain.zh: 在351所符合条件的学校中，每年只有68支球队能进入锦标赛。

q.en: What does 'single-elimination' mean in the tournament?
q.zh: 锦标赛中的“单场淘汰制”是什么意思？

options.en: A single loss prevents a team from moving on
options.zh: 输一场就被淘汰，无法继续前进

options.en: Only the best team loses
Every game ends in a tie
options.zh: 每场比赛都以平局收场

options.en: Teams play each other twice according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 球队之间要打两场（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: A single-elimination tournament is one in which a single loss prevents the loser from moving on.
explain.zh: 单场淘汰制指的是输掉一场就被淘汰、无法继续比赛。

q.en: What is a 'Cinderella story' in March Madness?
q.zh: 疯狂三月里的“灰姑娘故事”指的是什么？

options.en: The team that wins every year according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 每年都夺冠的球队（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A team from a big city
An underdog team that achieves an upset victory
options.zh: 一支弱队爆冷取得胜利

options.en: The referee's favorite team

explain.en: Cinderella teams are underdogs that claw their way to an exciting upset victory.
explain.zh: “灰姑娘球队”是不被看好的弱队，却一路爆冷取得激动人心的胜利。

q.en: Why does the author mention former President Obama filling out brackets?
q.zh: 作者为什么提到前总统奥巴马填写对阵表？

options.en: To show Obama was a great player according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 为了说明奥巴马是篮球高手（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: To show how popular March Madness is, even among non-sports fans
options.zh: 为了说明疯狂三月多受欢迎，连不看体育的人也参与

options.en: To describe the White House
To explain the rules of basketball

explain.en: Obama filled out a bracket on TV for eight years, showing the event's wide appeal beyond sports fans.
explain.zh: 奥巴马连续八年在电视上填写对阵表，说明这项赛事在体育迷之外也很受欢迎。

q.en: Which women's team has been the most dominant in March Madness history?
q.zh: 哪支女子球队在疯狂三月历史上最强势？

options.en: The Duke Blue Devils
The Tennessee Lady Volunteers
The Syracuse Orange
The Connecticut Huskies

explain.en: The Connecticut Huskies have eleven national championships, the most of any women's team.
explain.zh: 康涅狄格哈士奇队拿过11次全国冠军，是女子球队中最多的。

q.en: How are the 68 tournament teams chosen?
q.zh: 这68支参赛球队是怎么选出来的？

options.en: All 351 schools automatically according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 351所学校全部自动入选（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: 32 conference winners plus 36 chosen by a committee
options.zh: 32个赛区冠军，加上委员会选出的36支

options.en: The president picks them
Fans vote for all of them

explain.en: The 32 conference winners qualify automatically; the other 36 are chosen by a ten-person committee.
explain.zh: 32个赛区冠军自动晋级，其余36支由一个十人委员会选出。

q.en: In 2016, which low-ranked team beat #2 Michigan State?
q.zh: 2016年，哪支排名靠后的球队击败了二号种子密歇根州立大学？

options.en: The Villanova Wildcats according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 维拉诺瓦野猫队（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: The Middle Tennessee Blue Raiders
The Georgetown Hoyas
The Kansas Jayhawks

explain.en: The #15 Blue Raiders shocked fans by defeating #2 Michigan State 90-81 in the opening round.
explain.zh: 15号种子蓝突袭者队在首轮以90比81击败2号种子密歇根州立，震惊球迷。

q.en: What was the 'Billion-Dollar Bracket' offer about?
q.zh: “十亿美元对阵表”的悬赏是怎么回事？

options.en: Warren Buffett offered $1 billion for a perfect bracket
options.zh: 沃伦·巴菲特悬赏10亿美元给填出完美对阵表的人

options.en: A free trip to the Final Four according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一次免费的总决赛四强之旅（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Free tickets for life
A new basketball court

explain.en: In 2014, Warren Buffett and Quicken Loans offered $1 billion to anyone who chose the perfect bracket.
explain.zh: 2014年，沃伦·巴菲特和Quicken Loans悬赏10亿美元给填出完美对阵表的人。

q.en: In the 1983 championship, how did NC State win at the buzzer?
q.zh: 在1983年冠军赛中，北卡州立大学是如何在终场前绝杀的？

options.en: The coach scored a goal according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 教练进了球（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: The other team quit
A teammate caught the ball and dunked it as time ran out
options.zh: 一名队友接住球，在时间耗尽时扣篮得分

options.en: They made a free throw

explain.en: An NC State teammate caught the ball in midair and dunked it just as the clock ticked to zero, winning 54-52.
explain.zh: 北卡州立的一名队友在空中接住球，在计时归零时扣篮，以54比52获胜。

prompt.en: March Madness is exciting because any team can win. If your school team made it into a big tournament, what would you do to support them, and how would you feel if they were the underdog?
prompt.zh: 疯狂三月之所以精彩，是因为任何一支球队都可能获胜。如果你们学校的球队打进了大赛，你会怎么为他们加油？如果他们是弱队（underdog），你又会有什么感受？

en: Describe how you would cheer for your team, like filling out a bracket or watching games.
Think about why underdog stories are exciting for fans.
zh: 描述你会如何为球队加油，比如填写对阵表或看比赛。
想一想为什么弱队逆袭的故事会让球迷如此激动。
